Dipsacus colusana, also known as Colusana or Chinese Echium, is a plant species in the family Dipsacaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Dipsacus colusana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Dipsacus colusana is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
